title: Dekton 5PC Hook and Loop Sanding Sheets 140mm/Extra Coarse - 80 Grit | Ideal for Sheet Sanders | Multi-Surface Use on Wood, Metal, Plaster, Plastics & Paint | Heavy-Duty Sanding Performance
features: Extra Coarse 80 Grit: The Dekton 5PC Hook and Loop Detail Sanding Sheets are designed with a 80 grit surface, providing powerful sanding for heavy material removal, making it ideal for tough tasks like paint stripping and smoothing rough surfaces.

Multi-Surface Versatility: These sanding sheets are suitable for use on a wide range of surfaces including wood, metal, plaster, plastics, fiberglass, and painted surfaces, offering flexibility for various projects.

Hook and Loop Fastening: Featuring a convenient hook and loop attachment system, these sheets allow for quick and easy installation on your detail sander, ensuring secure attachment during use and easy sheet replacement when needed.

140mm Diameter for Sheet Sanders: Specifically designed for Sheet sanders, the 140mm diameter ensures even sanding and excellent coverage, making it suitable for both DIY and professional projects requiring precision and speed.

Durable and Long-Lasting: Manufactured with premium materials, these sanding sheets are built for durability and consistent performance, allowing you to complete your projects with reliable, long-lasting sanding power on demanding tasks.
description: From the manufacturer DT80766 5PC 100MM X 140MM 80 GRIT HOOK AND LOOP DETAIL SANDING SHEETS Suitable for detail sanders. Multi-surface, ideal for use on wood, metal, plaster, plastics, fibreglass, paint. Pre-punched with holes for dust extraction. Aluminium oxide: Suitable for all grinding works from coarse cutting to precision grinding of wooden surfaces. Optimal cost-effectiveness Consistent sanding results due to an optimised spreading of grains Fast replacement of sanding sheets due to hook & loop velcro backing. Easy to use. ADVANCED FEATURES HOOK AND LOOP VELCRO DESIGN Sanding Pads are quick and easy to stick and change, convenient to use. The sanding sheets fits most detail sanders. Tip: Please clean the dust and replace the old hook and loop sanding sheet before use HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL AND DURABILITY Top layer: Durable calcined abrasive. Middle layer: Thick E paper backing (250g/m2). Bottom layer: Durable Velcro back. Sanding discs are made from aluminium oxide abrasive, durable and anti-static, increases its service life. PRE-PUNCHED HOLES Sander sheets pre-punched with holes, making them great for dust extraction. The back of the sanding sheets are designed with the hook and loop Velcro, which provides strong adhesion. Making them hard to fall off. The grit mark on the back helps you quickly identify and select the correct sanding sheet. AVAILABLE IN VARIETY OF GRITS 5pc 40 grit DT80762. 5pc 60 grit DT80764. 5pc 80 grit DT80766. 5pc 120 grit DT80768. 12pc Mixed pack DT80770.
